positive: An ornate, symmetrical mystical forest scene featuring stylized glowing fauna and flora. The central subject is a magnificent, ethereal stag standing amidst glowing mushrooms and intricate vines. Style: Neo-Victorian etching mixed with modern bioluminescent art. Composition: Central, highly detailed composition with strong silhouettes for optimal print appeal. Lighting: Deep jewel-toned moonlight filtering through dense foliage, creating high contrast between the illuminated stags antlers and the surrounding dark forest. Color Direction: Emerald greens, sapphire blues, deep purples, and touches of glowing gold. Details: Intricate linework, clean edges, suitable for screen printing or apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, amateur, grain, bokeh
